attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

events.description: 上半场开始。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by João Cancelo (Portugal).

events.description: 若昂·坎塞洛犯规。

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 若昂·内维斯 进球，佩德罗·内托 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Portugal. Nuno Mendes is caught offside.

events.description: 葡萄牙越位。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left.

events.description: 尤恩·维萨射门偏出。
贝尔纳多·席尔瓦 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

events.description: 贝尔纳多·席尔瓦犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Cédric Bakambu (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Edo Kayembe.

events.description: 塞德里克·巴坎布射门被封堵。 埃多·卡耶姆贝参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Tomás Araújo.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Congo DR. Cédric Bakambu is caught offside.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国越位。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Portugal. Conceded by Chancel Mbemba.

events.description: 葡萄牙获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Renato Veiga (Portugal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 尤恩·维萨犯规。
昌切尔·姆本巴 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Pedro Neto (Portugal) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 昌切尔·姆本巴犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Edo Kayembe (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Diogo Costa (Portugal). Assisted by Steve Kapuadi.

events.description: 埃多·卡耶姆贝射正。 史蒂夫·卡普阿迪参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: João Neves (Portugal) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 埃多·卡耶姆贝犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by João Neves.

events.description: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯射门被封堵。 若昂·内维斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by João Cancelo (Portugal).

events.description: 若昂·坎塞洛犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Yoane Wissa (Congo DR).

events.description: 尤恩·维萨犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Samuel Moutoussamy (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Chancel Mbemba.

events.description: 塞缪尔·穆图萨米射门被封堵。 昌切尔·姆本巴参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: João Cancelo (Portugal) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 尤恩·维萨犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Samuel Moutoussamy (Congo DR) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Arthur Masuaku.

events.description: 塞缪尔·穆图萨米射门被封堵。 亚瑟·马苏库参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Vitinha.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Congo DR. Conceded by Bruno Fernandes.

events.description: 刚果民主共和国获得角球。

events.description: 尤恩·维萨 进球，亚瑟·马苏库 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Portugal 1, Congo DR 1.

events.description: 上半场结束。

events.description: 下半场开始。
